records.question: Which people at least 31 years old who graduated from Oklahoma work for PetroChina, an Oil and gas company headquartered in China with sales exactly 310.1 billion and a market value of at least 294.7 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN employment ON people.people_id = employment.people_id
JOIN company ON employment.company_id = company.company_id
WHERE company.sales_in_billion = 310.1 AND people.graduation_college = 'Oklahoma' AND company.market_value_in_billion >= 294.7 AND company.industry = 'Oil and gas' AND people.age >= 31 AND company.headquarters = 'China' AND company.name = 'PetroChina'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT people.People_ID 
FROM people 
JOIN employment ON people.People_ID = employment.People_ID 
JOIN company ON employment.Company_ID = company.Company_ID 
WHERE people.Age >= 31 
AND people.Graduation_College = 'Oklahoma' 
AND company.Name = 'PetroChina' 
AND company.Industry = 'Oil and gas' 
AND company.Headquarters = 'China' 
AND company.Sales_in_Billion = 310.1 
AND company.Market_Value_in_Billion >= 294.7

records.question: Who named Reggie Lewis graduated from Northeastern and is at least 27 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
WHERE people.graduation_college = 'Northeastern' AND people.name = 'Reggie Lewis' AND people.age >= 27
records.pred_sql: SELECT people.People_ID FROM people WHERE Name = 'Reggie Lewis' AND Graduation_College = 'Northeastern' AND Age >= 27

records.question: Who graduated from Oklahoma and works for an Oil and gas company that has profits of at least 20.6 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN employment ON people.people_id = employment.people_id
JOIN company ON employment.company_id = company.company_id
WHERE people.graduation_college = 'Oklahoma' AND company.profits_in_billion >= 20.6 AND company.industry = 'Oil and gas'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT people.People_ID 
FROM people 
JOIN employment ON people.People_ID = employment.People_ID 
JOIN company ON employment.Company_ID = company.Company_ID 
WHERE people.Graduation_College = 'Oklahoma' 
AND company.Industry = 'Oil and gas' 
AND company.Profits_in_Billion >= 20.6

records.question: Who are the people with at least 1 year of work experience?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN employment ON people.people_id = employment.people_id
WHERE employment.year_working >= 1
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT people.People_ID FROM people JOIN employment ON people.People_ID = employment.People_ID WHERE employment.Year_working >= 1
